name: GPT-5 mini
archDisplay: Cost-efficient mid-tier sibling of GPT-5's unified architecture; dense transformer, exact size undisclosed
note: Cost-efficient mid-tier of the GPT-5 family.

results.notes: AIME 2025, no tools, high reasoning effort
GPQA Diamond, no tools, high reasoning effort
Humanity's Last Exam, no tools, high reasoning effort

SWE-Bench Pro (Public), GPT-5 mini (high reasoning effort) baseline column in OpenAI's official GPT-5.4 mini/nano launch comparison table (Coding section). Confirmed directly by live-fetching the OpenAI blog page.

Terminal-Bench 2.0, GPT-5 mini (high) baseline column in OpenAI's official comparison table. Note: an independent Artificial Analysis re-run of 'Terminal-Bench v2.1' put GPT-5 mini (high) far lower (4%), likely reflecting a different/stricter agent harness; the official OpenAI-measured figure is used here as the more authoritative, directly-comparable number.

τ2-bench (telecom), GPT-5 mini (high) baseline column. This resolves a figure ('tau-bench 74.1') that this model's verificationNotes previously flagged as unconfirmed and dropped -- the correct benchmark identity is tau2-bench-telecom (not generic tau-bench), and the 74.1 score is now directly confirmed via OpenAI's own published table.

OSWorld-Verified (computer-use / GUI agent benchmark), GPT-5 mini (high) baseline column. The same launch post notes GPT-5.4 mini 'approaches GPT-5.4 while substantially outperforming GPT-5 mini' on this eval.

MMMU-Pro (no external tool), GPT-5 mini (high) baseline column, MM/Vision/CUA section. (The table's separate 'MMMU-Pro w/ Python' figure of 74.1% is a different, tool-augmented condition and is not used here.) An independent Artificial Analysis run of MMMU-Pro measured 70% for the same model -- close to, and consistent with, this official figure.

GDPval-AA v2 ('agentic real-world work tasks', normalized as (Elo-500)/2000), independently measured by Artificial Analysis on GPT-5 mini (high)'s live model page as one of the 9 components of their Intelligence Index v4.1. No OpenAI-published GDPval figure exists for this model, so this AA measurement is the only available data point.
IFBench (instruction following), independently measured by Artificial Analysis on GPT-5 mini (high)'s live model page. No OpenAI-published IFBench figure exists for this model.

verificationNotes: Existence, release date and pricing/context ($0.25/$2 per 1M, 400K context) confirmed by live-fetching developers.openai.com/api/docs/models/gpt-5-mini. Primary blog page returned 403 to direct fetch/was rate-limited on the fetch connector, so each result row was checked against secondary sources quoting the original figures. Confirmed exactly: AIME 91.1, GPQA 82.3, HLE 16.7, Aider polyglot 71.6. Could NOT independently confirm swe-bench (71), mmmu (81.6), or tau-bench (74.1) on any accessible source — those 3 rows were dropped per verification policy (never keep an unconfirmed number).
